sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53878" key="katadekte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταδεκ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n53878.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must accept</tr_>, Ps.-<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> </bibl>in Iriarte <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Matr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">389</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
